pricing_tiers.name: Starter
pricing_tiers.description: 15% contingency fee on recovered overcharges. No monthly fee.

pricing_tiers.name: Growth
pricing_tiers.description: 12% contingency fee + priority support + advanced analytics.

pricing_tiers.name: Enterprise

short_description: EDGE77 is an AI-powered freight invoice audit platform that automatically detects billing errors, duplicate payments, and overcharges on carrier invoices. Stop leaving money on the table — every invoice, every time.
long_description:
EDGE77 transforms freight invoice auditing from a manual, reactive process into an automated, proactive system. Our AI engine extracts invoice data with high accuracy, cross-references it against your contracted rates, and flags every discrepancy — from fuel surcharge overbilling to duplicate payments.

Key capabilities:
• Automated invoice ingestion — upload PDFs, our AI extracts 19+ fields per invoice
• Contract rate validation — catches overcharges on base rates, fuel surcharges, accessorials, insurance, and taxes
• Contingency-based pricing — you only pay when we find and recover money for you
• Audit trail and dispute letters — every finding documented with carrier-ready dispute letters
• Dashboard and analytics — real-time visibility into audit results, savings, and carrier performance

Whether you're a 3PL managing 500 invoices a month or a large shipper with thousands, EDGE77 scales to find every overcharge automatically.

key_features.title: AI-Powered Invoice Extraction
key_features.description: Upload any PDF invoice. Our AI extracts 19+ data points including base rate, fuel surcharge, accessorial charges, weight, freight class, and more. Handles scanned documents via OCR.

key_features.title: Automated Contract Rate Validation
key_features.description: Every invoice is automatically checked against your contracted rates. Detects fuel surcharge overcharges, accessorial markups, incorrect base rates, and insurance overbilling.

key_features.title: Contingency-Based Pricing
key_features.description: Start free. No monthly commitment. We earn a percentage of what we recover — aligning our incentives with yours.

key_features.title: Automated Dispute Generation
key_features.description: Every overcharge detected generates a carrier-ready dispute letter with findings documented in detail. Approve and send with one click.

key_features.title: Real-Time Dashboard
key_features.description: Track total audits, overcharges found, fees earned, and dispute status — all from a single dashboard. See carrier performance trends over time.

key_features.title: Multi-Carrier Support
key_features.description: Works with any carrier invoice. Supports LTL, truckload, and parcel billing. No carrier-specific setup required.

benefits: Recover 2-5% of total freight spend automatically
Zero upfront cost — pay only from recovered overcharges
Catch errors carriers miss: fuel surcharge, accessorials, minimum charges
Carrier-ready dispute documentation saves hours per claim
Free tier available for small shippers and 3PLs
differentiators: Free tier with contingency-only pricing (competitors charge monthly minimums)
AI-powered extraction (competitors use manual or rules-based approaches)
Modern cloud-native platform (competitors are legacy on-premise)
Self-serve signup and onboarding (no sales call required to start)
API-first architecture for easy integration with TMS and ERP systems

company_description: AXAL Global Inc. is a logistics technology company specializing in AI-powered freight audit and payment solutions. We help shippers and 3PLs recover billing errors automatically.
